entries.note: V63-B reuses the shipped V63-A remote session and shipped V63-A remote view by default.
V63-B introduces one richer typed remote intervention bridge only.
V63-B requires the consumed shipped V63-A remote view basis to remain explicit in the bridge packet.
Structured_answer, clarification, and inspect_rich remain non-mutating by themselves.
The selected bridge path may not generalize into all-device or all-surface law by default.
The selected richer bridge path remains path-level and non-generalizing by default.
